description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by a landscaped yard featuring various trees and shrubs. The front of the house has a wide driveway leading to a double garage, with a main entrance flanked by greenery and a small porch. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a large swimming pool and a wooden deck area, ideal for outdoor activities. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with large panes providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, giving the house a clean and contemporary appearance. Additional features include a fenced perimeter and paved walkways connecting different areas of the property.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, landscaped yard, double garage, and a backyard pool. The exterior is light-colored with large windows and a spacious driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, wide driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway extension, garage, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and deck area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large swimming pool, wooden deck, and symmetrical window arrangement on the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, deck, and additional landscaping, with the driveway extending to the street.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a small porch, wide steps, and minimalistic overhang, flanked by landscaping.
